dimos_cli_help.stdout_preview:
Usage: dimos [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                       
                                                                                
 Dimensional CLI                                                                
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --robot-ip                               TEXT              Override robot_ip │
│                                                            in GlobalConfig   │
│ --robot-ips                              TEXT              Override          │
│                                                            robot_ips in      │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --xarm7-ip                               TEXT              Override xarm7_ip │
│                                                            in GlobalConfig   │
│ --xarm6-ip                               TEXT              Override xarm6_ip │
│                                                            in GlobalConfig   │
│ --can-port                               TEXT              Override can_port │
│                                                            in GlobalConfig   │
│ --device-path                            TEXT              Override          │
│                                                            device_path in    │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --simulation                             TEXT              Override          │
│                                                            simulation in     │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --replay             --no-replay                           Override replay   │
│                                                            in GlobalConfig   │
│ --replay-db                              TEXT              Override          │
│                                                            replay_db in      │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --new-memory         --no-new-memory                       Override          │
│                                                            new_memory in     │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --viewer                                 [rerun|none]      Override viewer   │
│                                                            in GlobalConfig   │
│ --rerun-open                             [none|web|native  Override          │
│                                          |both]            rerun_open in     │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --rerun-web          --no-rerun-web                        Override          │
│                                                            rerun_web in      │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --rerun-host                             TEXT              Override          │
│                                                            rerun_host in     │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --rerun-websocke…                        INTEGER           Override          │
│                                                            rerun_websocket_… │
│                                                            in GlobalConfig   │
│ --n-workers                              INTEGER           Override          │
│                                                            n_workers in      │
│                                                            GlobalConfig      │
│ --memory-limit                           TEXT              Override          │
│

recommended_next_commands.name: install_sim_extra
recommended_next_commands.purpose: Install DimOS simulation dependencies when ready.

recommended_next_commands.name: replay_no_hardware
recommended_next_commands.purpose: Replay Go2 navigation without robot hardware.

recommended_next_commands.name: mujoco_smoke
recommended_next_commands.purpose: Run Go2 navigation stack in MuJoCo without opening a viewer.

recommended_next_commands.name: agentic_mujoco_daemon
recommended_next_commands.purpose: Start agentic Go2 simulation so MCP tools can be inspected.

recommended_next_commands.name: mcp_tools
recommended_next_commands.purpose: Confirm tool surface before any execution wrapper is added.

recommended_next_commands.name: local_replay_mpc_demo
recommended_next_commands.purpose: Regenerate the no-robot WorldForge replay-MPC trace.

safety_boundary: probe only; does not start simulation
probe only; does not connect to robot
probe only; does not call MCP tools
